title: Fix: Table overflow from unbreakable inline code and stale static assets in docs build
author: adiati98
body: ## Description We have several PRs that contains table that overflows such as these examples: - https://github.com/mautic/user-documentation/pull/841 - https://github.com/mautic/user-documentation/pull/279 (CSS fixed in this PR, but didn't touch the `make html` setting. **The reason of overflow:** Root-caused via local investigation: the CSS-only fix appeared to have no effect after rebuilding because `make html`'s incremental build reported "no targets are out of date" and skipped the static-file copy step entirely, leaving `docs/build/html/_static/tablefix.css` stale. This is a general gotcha (affects any future static asset edit, not just this one), so the build script fix is the durable solution rather than a one-off workaround. ### Changes - `docs/css/tablefix.css:` added rules scoped to `.wy-table-responsive` table to fix table overflow: - `table-layout`: fixed so declared `:widths:` percentages are actually respected instead of being treated as hints under the browser's default `table-layout: auto`. - `word-break`: `break-word` / `overflow-wrap: break-word` on `code` inside table cells, overriding the theme's `white-space: nowrap` on inline literals so long unbroken tokens (no spaces) can break instead of overflowing. - `.ddev/commands/web/build-docs`: changed `make html` to `make clean html` so every build is a full rebuild, guaranteeing static asset changes (like the CSS above) are always picked up — not just on `.rst` content changes. ### Trade-off `ddev build-docs` now always does a full rebuild instead of an incremental one, so it will take a bit longer. Given the size of this docs site, this seemed like the right trade for correctness. ## Linked issue N/A ## Screenshots or screen recordings ### Before ### After

title: Chores: Restructure website
author: adiati98
body:
<!--
Please write all information right after the headers (lines that start with ##). Don't write it in the comments (lines that wrapped inside the arrows).
-->

## Description

This PR restructures the website with below changes:

1. Add components: Header, Navigation, Footer, Hero, Courses, Resources, MobileMenu, MobileNav, Shoutouts, WeeklyTips, WIPBanner. **Note:** Shoutouts & WeeklyTips are not rendered.
2. Add a JS script for mobile menu
3. Add PagesLayout for pages style
4. Add an empty `about.astro` page
